**Women's [field hockey](/wiki/Field_hockey "Field hockey") at the [2006 Commonwealth Games](/wiki/2006_Commonwealth_Games "2006 Commonwealth Games")** took place between 16 March and 25 March. The competition consisted of a [round robin](/wiki/Round-robin_tournament "Round-robin tournament") stage of two groups of five with the winners and runners-up of each group qualifying for the semifinals. All matches were played at the [State Netball and Hockey Centre](/wiki/State_Netball_and_Hockey_Centre "State Netball and Hockey Centre") in the [Parkville](/wiki/Parkville,_Victoria "Parkville, Victoria") area of [Melbourne](/wiki/Melbourne "Melbourne").[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)

The Gold medal was won by [Australia](/wiki/Australia_women%27s_national_field_hockey_team "Australia women's national field hockey team"), who defeated 2002 champions [India](/wiki/India_women%27s_national_field_hockey_team "India women's national field hockey team") 1 – 0 in the final. [England](/wiki/England_women%27s_national_field_hockey_team "England women's national field hockey team") won the bronze medal by defeating [New Zealand](/wiki/New_Zealand_women%27s_national_field_hockey_team "New Zealand women's national field hockey team") 3 – 1 on penalty strokes.[[3]](#cite_note-3)
